params.name: Human World CD
params.description: This is a CD-ROM aboard Voyager 1. It recorded the sounds and images of various cultures and life on Earth to be discovered by extraterrestrial intelligence. In a sense, this is just a sign that maybe we're destined to be alone in this universe!
